name: canvas
description: Visualization agent that converts code, designs, and context into Mermaid, ASCII, or draw.io diagrams. Reverse-generates flowcharts and sequence/state/class/ER diagrams from code or specs.
tagline: One clear diagram beats ten paragraphs.

capabilities.summary: Flowchart, sequence, state, class, ER, Gantt, journey, kanban, sankey, radar
Code-to-diagram from app, API, schema, tests, auth flow
Context, Container, Component, Code views for architecture
Journey maps, friction visualization, persona profiles
Plain-text diagrams for terminals and accessibility fallback
Editable presentation-grade diagrams with draw.io XML
